role: This directory contains example template files that define the schema and rules for the ArchSpine repository indexing and mirror system.
responsibility: These files collectively provide the structural definitions and architectural rules needed to configure the ArchSpine pipeline for indexing source files, managing synchronization state, and enforcing clean architecture boundaries.

children.role: Defines a container module that groups source files within the repository indexing pipeline.
Configuration manifest for the ArchSpine mirror system, tracking indexed files and synchronization state.
Semantic indexing and protocol tooling for repository knowledge graphs.
Define and enforce a project-wide architectural rule prohibiting direct imports from the database layer in service and middleware code.
Architectural rule document for maintaining clean architecture boundaries
Metadata index file describing a source module (auth.ts) for the ArchSpine mirror system, enabling structural analysis and integrity verification.
